requirements.title: MTA - Mineral Reserve Sites Business View
requirements.description:
~~~~~~~~~~~~Defines areas within the province of British Columbia where mineral, placer and coal titles are restricted and placer titles are permitted. This business view contains a detailed set of attributes.

A reserve is established by a B.C. Regulation of the Chief Gold Commissioner under
- Section 22 of the Mineral Tenure Act: Mineral reserves 
- Section 21 of the Coal Act: Coal land reserves
and it is the legal instrument used to prevent or restrict access to mineral, placer and coal lands

requirements.title: OrgBook BC API
requirements.description: Anyone is able to use OrgBook BC data in their own services. Rather than needing to use the OrgBook BC website interface, the data is available directly from OrgBook BC using what developers call an API. Your developers could use this, for example, to integrate OrgBook BC data into your business processes.

requirements.title: MTA - Mineral Reserve Sites Business View - Operational Database
requirements.description:
This dataset is specific to the Mineral Titles Online IMF2 map viewer. While this version is not available, a public version of the data is accessible here: https://catalogue.data.gov.bc.ca/dataset/fef4b3ac-2cfc-4d30-afa7-2f29d9d25a10

requirements.title: BCTS Cut Permit / Road Permit Regulation - Blocks
requirements.description: These are the planned harvest blocks where BC Timber Sales (BCTS) identifies sustainable harvest units that provide the cost and price benchmarks for timber harvested from public land in British Columbia.

requirements.title: Forest Tenure Cut Permit Polygons
requirements.description:
"DEPRECATED - Layers prefaced with FTEN are updated and maintained on an on-going and continuous basis as tenures are issued. This is the spatial layer reflecting operational activities.
  
The spatial layer for a cut permit, which is a legal area cleared by the Ministry of Forests (that is, no other claims for the land exist) for harvesting purposes. requirements.title: BC Business Name Registration
requirements.description: Register your business name through BC Registries. Required for all businesses operating under a name other than the owner's legal name.

requirements.title: BC Name Request
requirements.description: Submit a Name Request to reserve your business name before registration.
